name: BreakBall
short_description: Shoot your friends with balls that bounce off walls in this fast-paced tactical arena fighter. Discover dozens of modifiers and millions of combinations, and beat your friends by being the fastest to adapt to the ever-changing rules!
detailed_description:
FAST-PACED TACTICAL MULTIPLAYER WITH BOUNCY BALLS


Use the arena to your advantage as you fight your friends in this split second strategy fighter where your shots bounce off walls and every hit is a knockout. Aim each shot carefully, as the balls you shoot have to be picked back up.

50+ GAMEPLAY MODIFIERS, 1,000,000+ COMBINATIONS


Discover over 50 modifiers that change the game rules. From hair triggers to teleportation, modifiers can combine to create wild and unique game modes in millions of different ways!

CHAOS: RANDOM MODIFIERS EACH ROUND


Play the chaos game mode, where the game picks a set of random modifiers every round. Beat your friends by being the fastest to adapt to the changing rules, or crank up the chaos amount and try to survive the total insanity!

Features:

  • 1-4 player local multiplayer
  • Steam Remote Play Together for online play with friends (no developer support)
  • Bots
  • 50+ gameplay modifiers, 1,000,000+ combinations
  • 24 maps
  • 18 player skins, 17 colors
  • Keyboard and controller support
